panels.title: Runner Failures by Reason
panels.description: sum by (runner_id, reason) aggregates over the per-replica `instance` axis — exact under multi-replica zombied because counters are additive and each replica's slice is disjoint.

panels.title: Runner Executions by Outcome
panels.description: sum by (runner_id, outcome) — exact under multi-replica (additive counter, disjoint per-replica slices).

panels.title: Runner Liveness — seconds since last seen
panels.description: min by (runner_id) — exact under multi-replica: the most-recent sighting across replicas wins, and a replica that never saw the runner exposes no series so min ignores it. A climbing value means the runner has gone quiet.

panels.title: Active Leases per Runner — best-effort under multi-replica
panels.description: sum by (runner_id). APPROXIMATE when zombied runs N>1: the +1 grant and -1 release can land on different replicas, so this is correct only in aggregate and a single-replica restart can transiently skew it. Exact value awaits the deferred lease-table refresher (see runner_fleet.md → Observability).

panels.title: Failure Cardinality Overflow
panels.description: Failure increments routed to runner_id="_other" because the 4096-slot table filled. Non-zero means runner cardinality exceeded capacity — per-runner failure attribution is lossy above the cap.

panels.title: Distinct Runners Tracked
panels.description: count of runner_ids currently in the in-memory slot table (capacity 4096).
